messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Chats for events you're going to or hosting.
messages.emptyHint: Mark "I'm going" on an event or create one to chat with attendees.
messages.loginRequired: Log in to see your event chats.

setup.title: Setup required
setup.message: Create a .env file in the project root with VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY. Get both from Supabase Dashboard -> Settings -> API. Then run the migration in supabase/migrations/ and restart the dev server.

events.title: Events
events.onboardingBody: Tap an event to open its page. There you can see full details, mark if you're going, and use the wall and chat once you've confirmed attendance.
events.configureSupabase: Configure Supabase in .env (see the banner above) to load and create events.
events.noOneGoingYet: No one has marked "I'm going" yet.
events.rsvpHint: Mark "I'm going" to unlock the event wall and chat.
events.wallLocked: Mark "I'm going" to see the wall and post.
events.loginToRsvp: Log in to say if you're attending this event.
events.newPostPlaceholder: Share an update, question, or coordination...
events.addPhotosSetup: Add photos: set VITE_CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME and VITE_CLOUDINARY_UPLOAD_PRESET in .env and restart the dev server (npm run dev).
events.question: Question
events.noPosts: No posts yet. Start the conversation!
events.chatLocked: Mark "I'm going" to see the chat.
events.chatClosed: Chat closed (closes 24h after the event). Read-only below. Check the wall for memories.
events.chatHintInfo: Chat with other attendees here or from Messages in the top bar. You can also use the floating button.
events.name: Name
events.locationHint: Location - search for an address or click the map
events.descriptionPlaceholder: What's it about? Why should people come?
events.dragCoverHint: Drag the image to adjust how it's cropped in the card.
events.searchAddressRequired: Search for an address above or pick a location on the map.
events.configureMapSupabase: Configure Supabase in .env to see events on the map.

auth.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.forgotPasswordBody: Enter your email and we will send you a link to choose a new password.
auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for that email, you will receive a message with instructions shortly.
auth.resetPasswordBody: Enter a new password for your account.
auth.invalidResetLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
auth.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
auth.errorUserAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Try logging in.
auth.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.errorSignupDisabled: Sign up is not available right now.
auth.errorSessionInvalid: Your session expired. Sign in again or request a new reset link.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.theySentRequest: They sent you a request. Accept in Friends.
profile.signInProfile: Sign in to view and edit your profile.
profile.newPhotoSelected: New photo selected. Save to upload.
profile.noUpcomingPlans: No upcoming plans. Browse events and tap "I'm going" to add them here.
profile.noPlans: You are not going to any events yet. Browse events and tap "I'm going" to add them here.

friends.title: Friends
friends.signInRequired: Sign in to see connection requests and your connections.
friends.noConnections: No connections yet. Send or accept requests to connect.
